title: Netherrack Resurrected
description: A texture pack that brings back to life the old style of the Netherrack with a modern look.
body:
# Netherrack Resurrected
This pack aims to restore the original look of the Nether without straying too far from the modern style of Minecraft. The design is based off of Jappa's cobblestone — much like how the old netherrack reused the cobblestone texture.

## About
The pack includes the textures for Netherrack and all its variants, and is free to redistribute, edit and include in any project. No attribution required.
Compatibility for mods won't be made by me, as this is a small project for personal use. But I'll gladly include any edits as add-ons if requested by their respective creators.

## Here's a preview of what the textures look like:
![Netherrack and its variants.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65ab2e15c1ad522c7c4eaa007f030d195999a199.png)
